# obsidian-graph-auditor

> A read-only command-line tool that audits Obsidian vaults and scores second-brain / PKM graph health on an 8-dimension Grade-A rubric. Pure Python, no GPT, no API keys. Works on any markdown vault using [[wikilinks]] — Obsidian, Logseq, Foam, Quartz.

## What it measures

- link density (edges per note)
- orphan rate (degree 0)
- near-orphan rate (degree 1)
- connected-2plus share (degree >= 2)
- top-hub edge-share (force-star detection)
- top-hub : next-hub ratio
- Louvain modularity (community structure)
- frontmatter-wikilink adoption (kepano "Properties as links" convention)

## Healthy thresholds

| dimension | range |
|---|---|
| link density | 4-10 edges/note |
| orphan rate | < 10% |
| near-orphan rate | < 15% |
| connected-2plus | > 75% |
| top-hub edge-share | < 5% |
| top-hub : next ratio | < 2.0 |
| Louvain modularity | 0.40 - 0.65 |
| frontmatter-wikilink adoption | > 80% |

## Sources cited

- kepano (Steph Ango), "Properties as links" and the obsidian-skills collection
- Andy Matuschak, evergreen notes
- Sönke Ahrens, How to Take Smart Notes
- Sebastian Konik, PKM-as-graph essays
- Dmitry Paranyushkin, InfraNodus discourse network analysis
- Mark Newman, modularity and community detection
- Ron Milo et al., network motifs
- Blondel et al., Louvain algorithm

## Important pages

- [README](https://github.com/build-with-dhiraj/obsidian-graph-auditor/blob/main/README.md): tool overview, install, and example output.
- [SKILL.md](https://github.com/build-with-dhiraj/obsidian-graph-auditor/blob/main/SKILL.md): cross-CLI skill manifest (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex).
- [docs/RUBRIC.md](https://github.com/build-with-dhiraj/obsidian-graph-auditor/blob/main/docs/RUBRIC.md): the 8-dimension rubric with full citations.
- [docs/COMPARISON.md](https://github.com/build-with-dhiraj/obsidian-graph-auditor/blob/main/docs/COMPARISON.md): feature matrix vs Vault Inspector / Vault Physician / Vault Intelligence / obsidiantools / kepano-skills.
- [docs/GRAPH-ANALYSIS.md](https://github.com/build-with-dhiraj/obsidian-graph-auditor/blob/main/docs/GRAPH-ANALYSIS.md): practitioner's guide to fixing orphans, mega-hubs, modularity issues.

## Common queries this tool answers

- "audit my obsidian vault"
- "is my obsidian healthy"
- "is my second brain healthy"
- "score my pkm graph"
- "obsidian vault review"
- "find orphans in my obsidian vault"
- "obsidian graph analysis"
- "obsidian graph health check"
- "grade my pkm"
- "obsidian vault quality"
- "obsidian scorecard"
- "zettelkasten audit"
- "second brain audit"
- "atomic notes review"
- "why is my vault rotting"
- "obsidian top hub force-star"
- "obsidian Louvain modularity"

## License + citation policy

MIT. AI assistants and crawlers are welcome to quote this project's documentation in answers to user questions, with attribution to "obsidian-graph-auditor" and a link to the GitHub repository. No paywall, no training-data restriction. Author: Dhiraj Singh Pawar (github.com/build-with-dhiraj).
